---
title: "Satislarin analizi"
author: "Ceyhun Mammadov"
date: "2026-07-14"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

<script>
   $(document).ready(function() {
     $head = $('#header');
     $head.prepend('<img src=\"https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcSz_jDCqViuhn1wzC61xiunhSMUcq2V21gInA&s\" style=\"float: right;width: 300px;\"/>')
   });
</script>

## Temizlik ve Join

```{r k, error=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE, include=TRUE}

library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(stringi)

setwd("C:/RR")
 
sort_words <- function(text_vector) {
  map_chr(text_vector, function(x) {
    if (is.na(x)) return(NA)
    words <- str_split(x, "\\s+")[[1]]
    words <- words[words != ""]
    if (length(words) == 0) return(NA)
    paste(sort(words), collapse = " ")
  })
}


clean_product_name_v9 <- function(x) {
  x <- toupper(x)
  
  # --- Sistem/ucot zibili: bunlar real mehsul deyil, NA qaytarilir ---
  is_junk <- str_detect(
    x,
    "\\b(SERBEST SATIS|SERBEST TICARET|EDV [0-9]+|ERZAQ|MEHSUL)\\b"
  ) | str_trim(x) == "SIQARET"
  x[is_junk] <- NA
  
  # --- Herflerin standartlasdirilmasi ---
  # (E=\u018f, S=\u015e, C=\u00c7, G=\u011e, O=\u00d6, U=\u00dc, I=\u0130)
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u018f", "E")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u015e", "S")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u00c7", "C")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u011e", "G")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u00d6", "O")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u00dc", "U")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u0130", "I")
  
  # --- Vergulu onluq noqteye cevir (reqem-reqem arasinda): 0,5 -> 0.5 ---
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "([0-9]),([0-9])", "\\1.\\2")
  
  # --- Cografi / dialekt / sive sinonimleri ---
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\bKUBA\\b", "QUBA")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\bSHEKER\\b", "SEKER")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\bPORTAGAL\\b", "PORTAXAL")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\bCOREYI\\b", "COREK")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\bSOQAN\\b", "SOGAN")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\bMIRIT\\b", "MELIT")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\bPESOK\\b", "SEKER TOZU")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\bPESOQ\\b", "SEKER TOZU")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\bDOLMALIG\\b", "DOLMALIQ")
  
  # --- Tesviri / artiq sozler ---
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\bSIQ\\.", "")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\b(SIQARET|ENDIRIMLI|AKSIYA|HEDIYYE|ICKI|ICKISI|ICECEGI|ENERJI|MB|KAPSUL|QARAGAT|SUPER|TEZE|SADE|BALACA|YENI|ED|EDED|EDEDLI|CEKI|PACKA|MENYU|IRI|BOYUK|XIRDA|ACIK|ACIQ)\\b", "")
  
  # --- Qablasdirma/marketinq sozleri (uygunluga mane olan) ---
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\b(PET|TETRAPAK|TETRAPACK|TP|CAM|SUSE|ARAQ|ALC|SB|DQ|D/Q)\\b", "")
  
  # --- Zibil simvollari ---
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "[().,_*\\-\u2013+=?&%]", " ")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u2116", "N")
  
  # --- Dukan prefikslerini ZENCIRVARI sil (qosa prefiksler ucun) ---
  for (i in 1:3) {
    x <- str_replace_all(x, "^(SF|MVT|GM|MT|M/T|M T|GY|ST)[.\\s\\-]+", "")
    x <- str_trim(x)
  }
  
  # --- Olcu vahidlerini standartlasdir (BOSLUGU SAXLAYARAQ - bug duzeldildi) ---
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\b(LT|LITR)\\b", "L")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\b(MILLILITR)\\b", "ML")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\b(KQ|KILOQRAM)\\b", "KG")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\b(QR|QRAM)\\b", "GR")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "([0-9])\\s+(L|ML|KG|GR)\\b", "\\1\\2")
  
  # --- Elave temizleme: yalniz herf/reqem/bosluq/noqte saxla ---
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "[^A-Z0-9. ]", "")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\.", "")
  x <- str_squish(x)
  
  # --- Sozleri elifba sirasina sal ---
  x <- sort_words(x)
  
  # Bos setirleri NA et
  x[x == ""] <- NA
  
  return(x)
}


cat("Datalari oxuyuruq...\n")
map_data <- readRDS("fp_map.rds")
receipts_data <- readRDS("fp_receipts.rds")

map_data$product <- stringi::stri_enc_toutf8(map_data$product, is_unknown_8bit = TRUE, validate = TRUE)
receipts_data$product_name <- stringi::stri_enc_toutf8(receipts_data$product_name, is_unknown_8bit = TRUE, validate = TRUE)

cat("V9 temizleme alqoritmi icra olunur (bu bir nece deqiqe ceke biler)...\n")

receipts_clean <- receipts_data %>%
  mutate(
    period = year(rec_date) * 100 + month(rec_date),
    product_clean = clean_product_name_v9(product_name)
  )

map_clean <- map_data %>%
  mutate(product_clean = clean_product_name_v9(product)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(product_clean)) %>%
  distinct(product_clean, period, .keep_all = TRUE)

merged_data <- receipts_clean %>%
  left_join(map_clean, by = c("product_clean" = "product_clean", "period" = "period")) %>%
  mutate(
    total_sales = qnt * unit_price,
    total_profit = total_sales * profit_margin
  )

# Yaddasi temizleyirik
rm(map_data, receipts_data, map_clean, receipts_clean)
gc()

n_total <- nrow(merged_data)
n_matched <- sum(!is.na(merged_data$profit_margin))

cat("\n========== NETICELER ==========\n")
cat("Movcud setir sayi:", n_total, "\n")
cat("Ugurla birlesen setir sayisi:", n_matched, "\n")
cat("Birlesme faizi:", round(n_matched / n_total * 100, 1), "%\n")

unmatched_top_100 <- merged_data %>%
  filter(is.na(profit_margin)) %>%
  count(product_name, sort = TRUE) %>%
  head(100)

View(unmatched_top_100)

saveRDS(merged_data, file = "merged_data.rds")

```


## slayd 1

>

```{r t1, error=FALSE,message=FALSE, warning=FALSE,echo=TRUE,include=TRUE}
 
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(scales)

setwd("C:/RR")


merged <- readRDS("merged_data.rds")


normalize_pos <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- toupper(x)
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u018F", "E")  # E -> E
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u011E", "G")  # G -> G
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u0130", "I")  # I -> I
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u015E", "S")  # S -> S
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u00C7", "C")  # C -> C
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u00D6", "O")  # O -> O
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u00DC", "U")  # U -> U
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "[^A-Z0-9 ]", " ")
  x <- str_squish(x)
  x
}


brand_rules <- tribble(
  ~brand,            ~pattern,
  "Araz",            "\\bARAZ\\b",
  "Bravo",           "\\bBRAVO\\b",
  "BazarStore",      "\\bBAZARSTORE\\b|\\bBAZAR STORE\\b",
  "Oba",             "\\bOBA\\b",
  "Spar",            "\\bSPAR\\b",
  "King Smart",      "\\bKING ?SMART\\b",
  "Bizim Market",    "\\bBIZIM MARKET\\b",
  "Rahat Market",    "\\bRAHAT\\b",
  "GrandMart",       "\\bGRAND ?MART\\b|\\bGRAND MARKET\\b",
  "MegaStore",       "\\bMEGA ?STORE\\b",
  "Neptun",          "\\bNEPTUN\\b",
  "AvroMart",        "\\bAVROMART\\b",
  "Qadiroglu",       "\\bQ[EA]DIROGLU\\b",
  "Amine Market",    "\\bAMIN[EA]? MARKET\\b",
  "En Ucuz",         "\\bEN UCUZ\\b",
  "McDonalds",       "\\bMC ?DONALD",
  "KFC",             "\\bKFC\\b",
  "Premium",         "\\bPREMIUM\\b",
  "Life Store",      "\\bLIFE STORE\\b|\\bLIFE CENTER\\b",
  "Qayali",          "\\bQAYALI\\b",
  "Sultan Market",   "\\bSULTAN MARKET\\b",
  "A Plus",          "\\bA PLUS\\b",
  "BolMart",         "\\bBOLMART\\b",
  "Ekonom Market",   "\\bEKONOM MARKET\\b",
  "Seda Store",      "\\bSEDA STORE\\b",
  "Port Baku",       "\\bPORT BAKU\\b",
  "Restoran",        "\\bRESTORAN\\b",
  "Aptek",           "\\bAPTEK\\b",
  "Erzaq Magazasi",  "\\bERZAQ MAGAZASI\\b",
  "Magaza (umumi)",  "^MAGAZA$|\\bMAGAZASI\\b",
  "Market (umumi)",  "\\bMARKET\\b"
)

assign_brand_vec <- function(norm_vec) {
  result <- rep("Diger", length(norm_vec))
  unassigned <- rep(TRUE, length(norm_vec))
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(brand_rules))) {
    idx <- which(unassigned)
    if (length(idx) == 0) break
    hit <- str_detect(norm_vec[idx], brand_rules$pattern[i])
    result[idx[hit]] <- brand_rules$brand[i]
    unassigned[idx[hit]] <- FALSE
  }
  result
}


pos_lookup <- tibble(pos = unique(merged$pos)) %>%
  mutate(
    pos_brand = assign_brand_vec(normalize_pos(pos)),
    pos_brand = if_else(pos_brand %in% c("Market (umumi)", "Magaza (umumi)"),
                        "Diger", pos_brand)
  )

merged <- merged %>% left_join(pos_lookup, by = "pos")


brand_top10 <- merged %>%
  filter(pos_brand != "Diger") %>%
  group_by(pos_brand) %>%
  summarise(satis = sum(total_sales, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(satis)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)

ggplot(brand_top10, aes(x = reorder(pos_brand, satis), y = satis)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#378ADD") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(scale = 1e-6, suffix = "M")) +   # <-- BU SETIR ELAVE OLUNDU
  labs(title = "Top 10 Brend Uzre Umumi Satis",
       x = NULL, y = "Satis (mln AZN)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

```

## slayd 2

>

```{r t2, error=FALSE,message=FALSE, warning=FALSE,echo=TRUE,include=TRUE}


library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(scales)

setwd("C:/RR")


merged <- readRDS("merged_data.rds")

normalize_pos <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x); x <- toupper(x)
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u018F", "E"); x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u011E", "G")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u0130", "I"); x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u015E", "S")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u00C7", "C"); x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u00D6", "O")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u00DC", "U")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "[^A-Z0-9 ]", " "); str_squish(x)
}

brand_rules <- tribble(
  ~brand,            ~pattern,
  "Araz",            "\\bARAZ\\b",
  "Bravo",           "\\bBRAVO\\b",
  "BazarStore",      "\\bBAZARSTORE\\b|\\bBAZAR STORE\\b",
  "Oba",             "\\bOBA\\b",
  "Spar",            "\\bSPAR\\b",
  "King Smart",      "\\bKING ?SMART\\b",
  "Bizim Market",    "\\bBIZIM MARKET\\b",
  "Rahat Market",    "\\bRAHAT\\b",
  "GrandMart",       "\\bGRAND ?MART\\b|\\bGRAND MARKET\\b",
  "MegaStore",       "\\bMEGA ?STORE\\b",
  "Neptun",          "\\bNEPTUN\\b",
  "AvroMart",        "\\bAVROMART\\b",
  "Qadiroglu",       "\\bQ[EA]DIROGLU\\b",
  "Amine Market",    "\\bAMIN[EA]? MARKET\\b",
  "En Ucuz",         "\\bEN UCUZ\\b",
  "McDonalds",       "\\bMC ?DONALD",
  "KFC",             "\\bKFC\\b",
  "Premium",         "\\bPREMIUM\\b",
  "Life Store",      "\\bLIFE STORE\\b|\\bLIFE CENTER\\b",
  "Qayali",          "\\bQAYALI\\b",
  "Sultan Market",   "\\bSULTAN MARKET\\b",
  "A Plus",          "\\bA PLUS\\b",
  "BolMart",         "\\bBOLMART\\b",
  "Ekonom Market",   "\\bEKONOM MARKET\\b",
  "Seda Store",      "\\bSEDA STORE\\b",
  "Port Baku",       "\\bPORT BAKU\\b",
  "Restoran",        "\\bRESTORAN\\b",
  "Aptek",           "\\bAPTEK\\b",
  "Erzaq Magazasi",  "\\bERZAQ MAGAZASI\\b",
  "Magaza (umumi)",  "^MAGAZA$|\\bMAGAZASI\\b",
  "Market (umumi)",  "\\bMARKET\\b"
)

assign_brand_vec <- function(nv) {
  res <- rep("Diger", length(nv)); un <- rep(TRUE, length(nv))
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(brand_rules))) {
    idx <- which(un); if (length(idx) == 0) break
    hit <- str_detect(nv[idx], brand_rules$pattern[i])
    res[idx[hit]] <- brand_rules$brand[i]; un[idx[hit]] <- FALSE
  }
  res
}

pos_lookup <- tibble(pos = unique(merged$pos)) %>%
  mutate(
    pos_brand = assign_brand_vec(normalize_pos(pos)),
    pos_brand = if_else(pos_brand %in% c("Market (umumi)", "Magaza (umumi)"),
                        "Diger", pos_brand)
  )
merged <- merged %>% left_join(pos_lookup, by = "pos")

brand_bottom10 <- merged %>%
  filter(pos_brand != "Diger") %>%
  group_by(pos_brand) %>%
  summarise(satis = sum(total_sales, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(satis) %>%       # artan sira - en az evvel
  slice_head(n = 10)

ggplot(brand_bottom10, aes(x = reorder(pos_brand, -satis), y = satis)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#378ADD") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(satis / 1e3), "K")),
            hjust = -0.15, size = 3.5, color = "grey30") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(scale = 1e-3, suffix = "K"),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  labs(title = "Bottom 10 Brend Uzre Umumi Satis ",
       x = NULL, y = "Satis (min AZN)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)


```


## slayd 3

>

```{r t3, error=FALSE,message=FALSE, warning=FALSE,echo=TRUE,include=TRUE}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

setwd("C:/RR")


merged <- readRDS("merged_data.rds")

# Gunluk umumi satis
daily <- merged %>%
  mutate(rec_date = as.Date(rec_date)) %>%
  group_by(rec_date) %>%
  summarise(satis = sum(total_sales, na.rm = TRUE))

# Sade xett qrafiki
ggplot(daily, aes(x = rec_date, y = satis)) +
  geom_line(color = "#378ADD", linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(color = "#185FA5", size = 1.8) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(scale = 1e-6, suffix = "M")) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%d %b", date_breaks = "5 days") +
  labs(title = "Gunluk Umumi Satis (19 Apr - 31 May 2024)",
       x = NULL, y = "Satis (mln AZN)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

```


## slayd 4


>

```{r t4, error=FALSE,message=FALSE, warning=FALSE,echo=TRUE,include=TRUE}



library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(scales)

setwd("C:/RR")


merged <- readRDS("merged_data.rds")

normalize_pos <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x); x <- toupper(x)
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u018F", "E"); x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u011E", "G")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u0130", "I"); x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u015E", "S")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u00C7", "C"); x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u00D6", "O")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u00DC", "U")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "[^A-Z0-9 ]", " "); str_squish(x)
}

brand_rules <- tribble(
  ~brand,            ~pattern,
  "Araz",            "\\bARAZ\\b",
  "Bravo",           "\\bBRAVO\\b",
  "BazarStore",      "\\bBAZARSTORE\\b|\\bBAZAR STORE\\b",
  "Oba",             "\\bOBA\\b",
  "Spar",            "\\bSPAR\\b",
  "King Smart",      "\\bKING ?SMART\\b",
  "Bizim Market",    "\\bBIZIM MARKET\\b",
  "Rahat Market",    "\\bRAHAT\\b",
  "GrandMart",       "\\bGRAND ?MART\\b|\\bGRAND MARKET\\b",
  "MegaStore",       "\\bMEGA ?STORE\\b",
  "Neptun",          "\\bNEPTUN\\b",
  "AvroMart",        "\\bAVROMART\\b",
  "Qadiroglu",       "\\bQ[EA]DIROGLU\\b",
  "Amine Market",    "\\bAMIN[EA]? MARKET\\b",
  "En Ucuz",         "\\bEN UCUZ\\b",
  "McDonalds",       "\\bMC ?DONALD",
  "KFC",             "\\bKFC\\b",
  "Premium",         "\\bPREMIUM\\b",
  "Life Store",      "\\bLIFE STORE\\b|\\bLIFE CENTER\\b",
  "Qayali",          "\\bQAYALI\\b",
  "Sultan Market",   "\\bSULTAN MARKET\\b",
  "A Plus",          "\\bA PLUS\\b",
  "BolMart",         "\\bBOLMART\\b",
  "Ekonom Market",   "\\bEKONOM MARKET\\b",
  "Seda Store",      "\\bSEDA STORE\\b",
  "Port Baku",       "\\bPORT BAKU\\b",
  "Restoran",        "\\bRESTORAN\\b",
  "Aptek",           "\\bAPTEK\\b",
  "Erzaq Magazasi",  "\\bERZAQ MAGAZASI\\b",
  "Magaza (umumi)",  "^MAGAZA$|\\bMAGAZASI\\b",
  "Market (umumi)",  "\\bMARKET\\b"
)

assign_brand_vec <- function(nv) {
  res <- rep("Diger", length(nv)); un <- rep(TRUE, length(nv))
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(brand_rules))) {
    idx <- which(un); if (length(idx) == 0) break
    hit <- str_detect(nv[idx], brand_rules$pattern[i])
    res[idx[hit]] <- brand_rules$brand[i]; un[idx[hit]] <- FALSE
  }
  res
}

pos_lookup <- tibble(pos = unique(merged$pos)) %>%
  mutate(
    pos_brand = assign_brand_vec(normalize_pos(pos)),
    pos_brand = if_else(pos_brand %in% c("Market (umumi)", "Magaza (umumi)"),
                        "Diger", pos_brand)
  )
merged <- merged %>% left_join(pos_lookup, by = "pos")

top_brands <- merged %>%
  filter(pos_brand != "Diger") %>%
  group_by(pos_brand) %>%
  summarise(cem_satis = sum(total_sales, na.rm = TRUE),
            orta_qebz = mean(total_sales, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(cem_satis)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)

ggplot(top_brands, aes(x = reorder(pos_brand, orta_qebz), y = orta_qebz)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#378ADD") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(orta_qebz, 1), " AZN")),
            hjust = -0.15, size = 3.5, color = "grey30") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  labs(title = "Orta Qebz Deyeri Brend Uzre (Top 10 brend, satis hecmine gore)",
       x = NULL, y = "Orta qebz setri deyeri (AZN)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

```

## slayd 5

>

```{r t5, error=FALSE,message=FALSE, warning=FALSE,echo=TRUE,include=TRUE}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(scales)

setwd("C:/RR")


merged <- readRDS("merged_data.rds")

normalize_pos <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x); x <- toupper(x)
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u018F", "E"); x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u011E", "G")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u0130", "I"); x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u015E", "S")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u00C7", "C"); x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u00D6", "O")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u00DC", "U")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "[^A-Z0-9 ]", " "); str_squish(x)
}

brand_rules <- tribble(
  ~brand,            ~pattern,
  "Araz",            "\\bARAZ\\b",
  "Bravo",           "\\bBRAVO\\b",
  "BazarStore",      "\\bBAZARSTORE\\b|\\bBAZAR STORE\\b",
  "Oba",             "\\bOBA\\b",
  "Spar",            "\\bSPAR\\b",
  "King Smart",      "\\bKING ?SMART\\b",
  "Bizim Market",    "\\bBIZIM MARKET\\b",
  "Rahat Market",    "\\bRAHAT\\b",
  "GrandMart",       "\\bGRAND ?MART\\b|\\bGRAND MARKET\\b",
  "MegaStore",       "\\bMEGA ?STORE\\b",
  "Neptun",          "\\bNEPTUN\\b",
  "AvroMart",        "\\bAVROMART\\b",
  "Qadiroglu",       "\\bQ[EA]DIROGLU\\b",
  "Amine Market",    "\\bAMIN[EA]? MARKET\\b",
  "En Ucuz",         "\\bEN UCUZ\\b",
  "McDonalds",       "\\bMC ?DONALD",
  "KFC",             "\\bKFC\\b",
  "Premium",         "\\bPREMIUM\\b",
  "Life Store",      "\\bLIFE STORE\\b|\\bLIFE CENTER\\b",
  "Qayali",          "\\bQAYALI\\b",
  "Sultan Market",   "\\bSULTAN MARKET\\b",
  "A Plus",          "\\bA PLUS\\b",
  "BolMart",         "\\bBOLMART\\b",
  "Ekonom Market",   "\\bEKONOM MARKET\\b",
  "Seda Store",      "\\bSEDA STORE\\b",
  "Port Baku",       "\\bPORT BAKU\\b",
  "Restoran",        "\\bRESTORAN\\b",
  "Aptek",           "\\bAPTEK\\b",
  "Erzaq Magazasi",  "\\bERZAQ MAGAZASI\\b",
  "Magaza (umumi)",  "^MAGAZA$|\\bMAGAZASI\\b",
  "Market (umumi)",  "\\bMARKET\\b"
)

assign_brand_vec <- function(nv) {
  res <- rep("Diger", length(nv)); un <- rep(TRUE, length(nv))
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(brand_rules))) {
    idx <- which(un); if (length(idx) == 0) break
    hit <- str_detect(nv[idx], brand_rules$pattern[i])
    res[idx[hit]] <- brand_rules$brand[i]; un[idx[hit]] <- FALSE
  }
  res
}

# Brendi UNIKAL magaza adlari uzerinde tap (her ad = 1 magaza)
pos_lookup <- tibble(pos = unique(merged$pos)) %>%
  mutate(
    pos_brand = assign_brand_vec(normalize_pos(pos)),
    pos_brand = if_else(pos_brand %in% c("Market (umumi)", "Magaza (umumi)"),
                        "Diger", pos_brand)
  )

store_count <- pos_lookup %>%
  filter(pos_brand != "Diger") %>%
  count(pos_brand, name = "magaza_sayi") %>%
  arrange(desc(magaza_sayi)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)

ggplot(store_count, aes(x = reorder(pos_brand, magaza_sayi), y = magaza_sayi)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#378ADD") +
  geom_text(aes(label = magaza_sayi), hjust = -0.2, size = 3.5, color = "grey30") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12))) +
  labs(title = "Brend Uzre Unikal Magaza Sayi (Sebeke Boyukluyu, Top 10)",
       x = NULL, y = "Unikal magaza sayi") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

```




## slayd 6

>

```{r t6, error=FALSE,message=FALSE, warning=FALSE,echo=TRUE,include=TRUE}


library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(scales)

setwd("C:/RR")


merged <- readRDS("merged_data.rds")

top_products <- merged %>%
  filter(!is.na(product_clean)) %>%
  group_by(product_clean) %>%
  summarise(satis = sum(total_sales, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(satis)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 15)

# Sistem/ucot qeydi pattern-i (real mehsul deyil)
junk_pattern <- paste0(
  "SAT SRBST|SATISH|SRBST TICART|KREDIT|AVANS|UMUMI|^RZAQ$|GEYIMLRI|DD |MEBEL|",
  "DERMAN|^DV |XSTDN|^SATIS$|EDV|MEHSUL|^ERZAQ$|RQMSAL|^MAL$|^MAGAZA$"
)
top_products <- top_products %>%
  mutate(tip = if_else(str_detect(product_clean, junk_pattern),
                       "Sistem qeydi", "Real mehsul"))

ggplot(top_products, aes(x = reorder(product_clean, satis), y = satis, fill = tip)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(satis / 1e6, 1), "M")),
            hjust = -0.15, size = 3.3, color = "grey30") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Real mehsul" = "#185FA5",
                               "Sistem qeydi" = "#378ADD")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(scale = 1e-6, suffix = "M"),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  labs(title = "En Cox 'Satilan' Mehsullar (Top 15, xam product_clean)",
       subtitle = "Top siralarin coxu real mehsul deyil, sistem qeydidir (SAT SRBST, KREDIT, EDV...)",
       x = NULL, y = "Satis (mln AZN)", fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

```



## slayd 7

>

```{r t7, error=FALSE,message=FALSE, warning=FALSE,echo=TRUE,include=TRUE}


library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
library(scales)

setwd("C:/RR")


merged <- readRDS("merged_data.rds")

weekday_sales <- merged %>%
  mutate(rec_date = as.Date(rec_date)) %>%
  filter(rec_date != as.Date("2024-04-19")) %>%   # backfill anomaliyasini cixar
  mutate(
    wd_num = wday(rec_date, week_start = 1),        # 1=B.ertesi ... 7=Bazar
    wd_ad  = factor(wd_num, levels = 1:7,
                    labels = c("B.ertesi","Cersenbe ax.","Cersenbe",
                               "Cume ax.","Cume","Senbe","Bazar"))
  ) %>%
  group_by(wd_ad) %>%
  summarise(
    cem_satis = sum(total_sales, na.rm = TRUE),
    gun_sayi  = n_distinct(rec_date),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(orta_gunluk = cem_satis / gun_sayi)

ggplot(weekday_sales, aes(x = wd_ad, y = orta_gunluk, group = 1)) +
  geom_line(color = "#378ADD", linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(color = "#185FA5", size = 3) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(orta_gunluk / 1e6, 1), "M")),
            vjust = -1, size = 3.5, color = "grey30") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(scale = 1e-6, suffix = "M"),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0.08, 0.15))) +
  labs(title = "Heftenin Gunu Uzre Ortalama Gunluk Satis",
       subtitle = "19 aprel (backfill anomaliyasi) cixarilib",
       x = NULL, y = "Ortalama gunluk satis (mln AZN)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)


```




## slayd 8

>

```{r t8, error=FALSE,message=FALSE, warning=FALSE,echo=TRUE,include=TRUE}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

setwd("C:/RR")


merged <- readRDS("merged_data.rds")

# Gunluk qeyd sayi
daily_cnt <- merged %>%
  mutate(rec_date = as.Date(rec_date)) %>%
  count(rec_date, name = "qeyd_sayi")

# 19 apreli isaretle
daily_cnt <- daily_cnt %>%
  mutate(anomaliya = if_else(rec_date == as.Date("2024-04-19"),
                             "19 aprel (backfill)", "Normal gun"))

ggplot(daily_cnt, aes(x = rec_date, y = qeyd_sayi, fill = anomaliya)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("19 aprel (backfill)" = "#D64550",
                               "Normal gun" = "#378ADD")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(scale = 1e-6, suffix = "M")) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%d %b", date_breaks = "5 days") +
  labs(title = "Gunluk Qeyd Sayi: 19 Aprel Anomaliyasi",
       x = NULL, y = "Qeyd sayi (mln)", fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))


```

## slayd 9

>

```{r t9, error=FALSE,message=FALSE, warning=FALSE,echo=TRUE,include=TRUE}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(scales)

setwd("C:/RR")


merged <- readRDS("merged_data.rds")

# Gunluk qeyd sayi -> 20-31 may araligi
daily_cnt <- merged %>%
  mutate(rec_date = as.Date(rec_date)) %>%
  count(rec_date, name = "qeyd_sayi") %>%
  filter(rec_date >= as.Date("2024-05-20"),
         rec_date <= as.Date("2024-05-31")) %>%
  # bos gunleri (28-30 may) 0 ile doldur ki, boluq gorunsun
  complete(rec_date = seq(as.Date("2024-05-20"), as.Date("2024-05-31"), by = "day"),
           fill = list(qeyd_sayi = 0))

# Anomal gunleri isaretle (25-30 may)
daily_cnt <- daily_cnt %>%
  mutate(tip = if_else(rec_date >= as.Date("2024-05-25") &
                         rec_date <= as.Date("2024-05-30"),
                       "Anomal (boluq)", "Normal gun"))

ggplot(daily_cnt, aes(x = rec_date, y = qeyd_sayi, fill = tip)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(aes(label = comma(qeyd_sayi)), vjust = -0.5, size = 3, color = "grey30") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Anomal (boluq)" = "#D64550",
                               "Normal gun" = "#378ADD")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(scale = 1e-3, suffix = "K"),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%d %b", date_breaks = "1 day") +
  labs(title = "May Sonu Data Boslugu Anomaliyasi",
       x = NULL, y = "Qeyd sayi (min)", fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  
```

## slayd 10

> 

```{r t10, error=FALSE,message=FALSE, warning=FALSE,echo=TRUE,include=TRUE}

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(knitr)

setwd("C:/RR")


merged <- readRDS("merged_data.rds")

# Invalid UTF-8 baytlari temizle (kable ve str_detect xetalarinin qarsisi)
merged$product_clean <- iconv(merged$product_clean, "UTF-8", "UTF-8", sub = "")
merged$pos           <- iconv(merged$pos, "UTF-8", "UTF-8", sub = "")

# Sistem/ucot zibili filtri (real mehsullara fokuslan)
junk <- "SAT|SATIS|SRBST|TICART|KREDIT|AVANS|UMUMI|RZAQ|MEHSUL|PAKET|^DV |EDV|QIDA|MAL|GNDLIK|DERMAN|MALLAR|TLBAT"

anomaly_tbl <- merged %>%
  filter(!is.na(product_clean), !is.na(unit_price),
         unit_price > 0, unit_price < 10000,
         !str_detect(product_clean, junk)) %>%
  group_by(product_clean) %>%
  filter(n() >= 500) %>%                     # statistik etibarli olmasi ucun
  mutate(orta_qiymet = mean(unit_price),
         nisbet      = unit_price / orta_qiymet) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(desc(nisbet)) %>%
  distinct(product_clean, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%   # her mehsuldan 1 (en ekstremal)
  slice_head(n = 8) %>%
  transmute(
    Mehsul       = str_to_sentence(product_clean),
    `Bu magaza`  = paste0(round(unit_price, 1), " AZN"),
    `Orta qiymet`= paste0(round(orta_qiymet, 2), " AZN"),
    `Ferq`       = paste0(round(nisbet), "x"),
    Magaza       = str_to_title(tolower(pos))
  )

kable(anomaly_tbl,
      caption = "Eyni mehsulun orta qiymetinden kekin kenara cixan qeydler (qiymet giris xetalari)")

```



## slayd 11

> 

```{r t11, error=FALSE,message=FALSE, warning=FALSE,echo=TRUE,include=TRUE}

library(dplyr)
library(knitr)

setwd("C:/RR")


merged <- readRDS("merged_data.rds")

# Invalid UTF-8 temizle
merged$product_clean <- iconv(merged$product_clean, "UTF-8", "UTF-8", sub = "")
merged$pos           <- iconv(merged$pos, "UTF-8", "UTF-8", sub = "")

qnt_outliers <- merged %>%
  arrange(desc(qnt)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10) %>%
  transmute(
    Mehsul       = substr(trimws(product_clean), 1, 25),
    `Miqdar (qnt)` = format(round(qnt), big.mark = " "),
    `Qiymet`     = paste0(round(unit_price, 2), " AZN"),
    Magaza       = substr(trimws(pos), 1, 25)
  )

kable(qnt_outliers,
      caption = "En boyuk miqdar qeydleri - hamisinda qiymet 1.01 AZN (sahe yerdeyismesi xetasi)")

# --- Konteks: qnt paylanmasi (danisiq ucun) ---
cat("\n\nqnt paylanmasi:\n")
merged %>%
  summarise(
    `qnt 2-10 (%)`    = round(100 * mean(qnt >= 2 & qnt <= 10), 1),
    `qnt 10-100 (%)`  = round(100 * mean(qnt > 10 & qnt <= 100), 2),
    `qnt > 1000 (%)`  = round(100 * mean(qnt > 1000), 4),
    `max qnt`         = max(qnt, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  print()

```

## slayd 12

> 

```{r t12, error=FALSE,message=FALSE, warning=FALSE,echo=TRUE,include=TRUE}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

setwd("C:/RR")


merged <- readRDS("merged_data.rds")

# Gunluk satis
daily <- merged %>%
  mutate(rec_date = as.Date(rec_date)) %>%
  group_by(rec_date) %>%
  summarise(satis = sum(total_sales, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(rec_date)

# Anomal gunleri cixar (19 apr + 25-31 may)
daily_clean <- daily %>%
  filter(rec_date != as.Date("2024-04-19"),
         !(rec_date >= as.Date("2024-05-25") & rec_date <= as.Date("2024-05-31")))

orta <- mean(daily_clean$satis)

# Statistik trend testi (danisiq ucun konsola)
daily_clean$t <- seq_len(nrow(daily_clean))
fit <- lm(satis ~ t, data = daily_clean)
cat("Trend p-value:", round(summary(fit)$coefficients[2,4], 3),
    "| R2:", round(summary(fit)$r.squared, 3),
    "| orta gunluk satis:", round(orta), "AZN\n")

ggplot(daily_clean, aes(x = rec_date, y = satis)) +
  geom_line(color = "#378ADD", linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(color = "#185FA5", size = 1.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = orta, color = "#D64550",
             linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  annotate("text", x = min(daily_clean$rec_date), y = orta,
           label = paste0("Orta: ", round(orta/1e6, 1), "M"),
           hjust = -0.1, vjust = -0.6, color = "#D64550", size = 3.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(scale = 1e-6, suffix = "M"),
                     limits = c(0, NA)) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%d %b", date_breaks = "5 days") +
  labs(title = "Temiz Gunluk Satis (Anomal Gunler Cixarilmis)",
       subtitle = "Statistik ehemiyyetli trend yoxdur (p=0.33) - satis orta 3.1M etrafinda dalgalanir",
       x = NULL, y = "Satis (mln AZN)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

```


## slayd 13

> 

```{r t13, error=FALSE,message=FALSE, warning=FALSE,echo=TRUE,include=TRUE}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

setwd("C:/RR")


merged <- readRDS("merged_data.rds")

# Temiz gunluk satis (anomal gunler cixarilmis)
daily_clean <- merged %>%
  mutate(rec_date = as.Date(rec_date)) %>%
  group_by(rec_date) %>%
  summarise(satis = sum(total_sales, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(rec_date != as.Date("2024-04-19"),
         !(rec_date >= as.Date("2024-05-25") & rec_date <= as.Date("2024-05-31"))) %>%
  arrange(rec_date) %>%
  mutate(tip = "Tarixi")

orta <- mean(daily_clean$satis)
std  <- sd(daily_clean$satis)


son_tarix <- max(daily_clean$rec_date)
son_qiymet <- daily_clean$satis[daily_clean$rec_date == son_tarix]

forecast_df <- tibble(
  rec_date = c(son_tarix, seq(son_tarix + 1, son_tarix + 7, by = "day")),
  satis    = c(son_qiymet, rep(orta, 7)),
  asagi    = c(son_qiymet, rep(orta - std, 7)),
  yuxari   = c(son_qiymet, rep(orta + std, 7))
)

ggplot() +
  # proqnoz zolagi (en altda)
  geom_ribbon(data = forecast_df,
              aes(x = rec_date, ymin = asagi, ymax = yuxari),
              fill = "#D64550", alpha = 0.15) +
  # tarixi data
  geom_line(data = daily_clean, aes(x = rec_date, y = satis),
            color = "#378ADD", linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(data = daily_clean, aes(x = rec_date, y = satis),
             color = "#185FA5", size = 1.6) +
  # proqnoz xetti (en ustde, qalin ve aydin)
  geom_line(data = forecast_df, aes(x = rec_date, y = satis),
            color = "#D64550", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1.4) +
  geom_point(data = forecast_df, aes(x = rec_date, y = satis),
             color = "#D64550", size = 2.2) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(scale = 1e-6, suffix = "M"),
                     limits = c(0, NA)) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%d %b", date_breaks = "5 days") +
  labs(title = "Qisamuddetli Proqnoz: Novbeti 7 Gun ~3.1M AZN/gun",
       subtitle = "Trend olmadigi ucun sabit seviyye proqnozu | zolaq: orta +/- 1 std",
       x = NULL, y = "Satis (mln AZN)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))


```



## slayd 14

> 

```{r t14, error=FALSE,message=FALSE, warning=FALSE,echo=TRUE,include=TRUE}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

setwd("C:/RR")


merged <- readRDS("merged_data.rds")
merged$pos <- iconv(merged$pos, "UTF-8", "UTF-8", sub = "")

araz_daily <- merged %>%
  filter(grepl("\\bARAZ\\b", toupper(pos), perl = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(rec_date = as.Date(rec_date)) %>%
  group_by(rec_date) %>%
  summarise(satis = sum(total_sales, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(rec_date != as.Date("2024-04-19"),
         !(rec_date >= as.Date("2024-05-25") & rec_date <= as.Date("2024-05-31"))) %>%
  arrange(rec_date)

orta <- mean(araz_daily$satis)
std  <- sd(araz_daily$satis)

araz_daily$t <- seq_len(nrow(araz_daily))
fit <- lm(satis ~ t, data = araz_daily)
cat("Araz trend p-value:", round(summary(fit)$coefficients[2,4], 3),
    "| R2:", round(summary(fit)$r.squared, 3),
    "| orta gunluk satis:", round(orta), "AZN\n")

son_tarix <- max(araz_daily$rec_date)
son_qiymet <- araz_daily$satis[araz_daily$rec_date == son_tarix]

forecast_df <- tibble(
  rec_date = c(son_tarix, seq(son_tarix + 1, son_tarix + 7, by = "day")),
  satis    = c(son_qiymet, rep(orta, 7)),
  asagi    = c(son_qiymet, rep(orta - std, 7)),
  yuxari   = c(son_qiymet, rep(orta + std, 7))
)

ggplot() +
  geom_ribbon(data = forecast_df,
              aes(x = rec_date, ymin = asagi, ymax = yuxari),
              fill = "#D64550", alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_line(data = araz_daily, aes(x = rec_date, y = satis),
            color = "#378ADD", linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(data = araz_daily, aes(x = rec_date, y = satis),
             color = "#185FA5", size = 1.6) +
  geom_line(data = forecast_df, aes(x = rec_date, y = satis),
            color = "#D64550", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1.4) +
  geom_point(data = forecast_df, aes(x = rec_date, y = satis),
             color = "#D64550", size = 2.2) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(scale = 1e-3, suffix = "K"),
                     limits = c(0, NA)) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%d %b", date_breaks = "5 days") +
  labs(title = "Araz Brendi Ucun Qisamuddetli Proqnoz",
       subtitle = "Trend yoxdur (p=0.48) - umumi bazar pattern-i burada da tesdiqlenir",
       x = NULL, y = "Gunluk satis (min AZN)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))


```
